name: Ninjago Legends: Monstrosity
overview: After ‘the Merge,’ Kai finds himself in the dark and dangerous Land of Monsters. Surrounded by terrifying creatures, he’s not just looking for his friends—he’s fighting to survive! As his journey unfolds, Kai uncovers shocking secrets and realizes he’s not alone in this twisted world. What secrets lie hidden in the shadows?

trailers.title: Official Trailer | Into the Land of Monsters!
